response.justification: Bogdan brings 20+ years of engineering breadth, genuine high-throughput distributed systems experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby, solid TypeScript depth, and current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq — all meaningful signals for this role. However, Python does not appear anywhere in the resume, which is a stated must-have and a hard gap. The high-throughput systems work is from 2011–2013, raising real questions about current depth in that domain. Staff-level technical strategy, cross-functional stakeholder management, and incident-response ownership are not evidenced clearly enough to confidently clear the bar without a conversation.
strengths: Real high-throughput distributed systems experience: built low-latency services handling millions of HTTP req/s with async I/O, caching, and fibers at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Current AI-native tooling work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq, directly aligned with the role's AI-driven engineering baseline
Strong TypeScript and Node.js depth across multiple roles, backed by genuine systems breadth spanning embedded, mobile, web, and distributed domains over 20+ years
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume — skills list, job history, and projects — which is a stated must-have with no evident mitigation
High-throughput distributed systems work was concentrated at Sociomantic (2011–2013); current depth in this domain is unclear from the resume
No explicit evidence of cross-functional stakeholder management, on-call or incident-response ownership, or technical strategy execution at staff scope
